# Alpha {#sec:alpha}

\begin{mathmeta}
  \define{BaireSpace}
\end{mathmeta}

Here is $\BaireSpace$.

Define\termdefine{sample term}. Use \termuse{sample term}. Alias \termuseas{sample term}{sample terms}.
Refer\termref{sample term}.

See §{sec:beta}.

## Beta {#sec:beta}
